description: Stay organized and boost your productivity with this Pack of 5 Neon Lined Notepads. Each pack includes five assorted vibrant colours—perfect for colour-coding tasks, reminders, or study notes. With 40 sheets per pad, you'll have plenty of space to jot down important information. Designed for everyday use, these lined sticky notes feature a convenient size of 76mm x 126mm, ideal for desktops, planners, notebooks, and more. Whether you're at the office, in school, or working from home, these neon notepads add a pop of colour while helping you stay on track.
